block.header: ipabasiru tarumi no upe no sawarabi no moyeiduru paru ni narinikyeru kamo
kamunabwi no ipase no mori no ywobukwodori itaku na naki so wa ga kwopwimasaru
awayuki ka padare ni puru to miru madeni nagarapetiru pa nani no pana so mo
paruyama no saki no wowori ni wakana tumu imo ga sirapimo miraku si yosi mo

sentence.transcription: mira ku si yo si mo

block.header: utinabiku paru kitaru rasi yama no ma no topoki konure no sakiyuku mireba
kozo no paru ikozite uwesi wa ga yadwo no wakakwi no ume pa pana sakinikyeri
paru no nwo ni sumire tumi ni to kosi ware so nwo wo natukasimi pitoywo nenikyeru
asipikwino yamasakurabana pinarabete kaku sakitaraba itaku kwopwime ya mo

sentence.transcription: ita ku kwopwi me ya mo

block.header: wa ga sekwo ni misemu to omopisi ume no pana sore to mo miyezu yuki no purereba

sentence.transcription: sore to mo mi ye zu

block.header: asu ywori pa wakana tumamu to simesi nwo ni kinopu mo kyepu mo yuki pa puritutu
ositeru nanipa wo sugwite utinabiku kusakanoyama wo yupugure ni wa ga kwoyekureba yama mo seni sakyeru asibi no nikukaranu kimi wo itusika yukite paya mimu
wotomyera ga kazasi no tameni miyabwiwo no kadura no tameto sikimaseru kuni no patate ni sakinikyeru sakura no pana no nipopi pa mo anani
kozo no paru apyerisi kimi ni kwopwinite si sakura no pana pa mukapekye rasi mo
kudaranwo no pagwi no puruye ni paru matu to worisi ugupisu nakinikyemu kamo
wa ga sekwo ga mi ramu sapodi no awoyagwi wo taworite dani mo mimu yosi moga mo
utinoboru sapo no kapara no awoyagwi pa ima pa parubye to narinikyeru kamo
simo yuki mo imada sugwineba omopanu ni kasuga no satwo ni ume no pana mitu
kapadu naku kamunabwi kapa ni kage miyete ima ka saku ramu yamabuki no pana
pupumyeri to ipisi ume ga ye kyesa purisi awayuki ni apite sakinu ramu kamo
kasumitatu kasuga no satwo no ume no pana yama no arasi ni tirikosu na yume
kasumitatu kasuga no satwo no ume no pana panani twopamu to wa ga omopanaku ni

sentence.transcription: wa ga omopa na ku ni

block.header: toki pa ima pa paru ni narinu to miyuki puru topoki yamapye ni kasumi tanabiku
parusame no sikusiku puru ni takamatwonoyama no sakura pa ikani ka aru ramu
utikwirasi yuki pa puritutu sikasugani wagipye no sono ni ugupisu naku mo
nanipapye ni pito no yukyereba okurewite wakana tumu kwo wo miru ga kanasisa
kasumi tatu nwo no pe no kata ni yukisikaba ugupisu nakitu paru ni naru rasi

sentence.transcription: nwo no pe no kata ni

block.header: yamabuki no sakitaru nwopye no tubosumire ko no paru no ame ni sakari narikyeri

sentence.transcription: ko no paru no ame ni

block.header: kaze mazipe yuki pa puru tomo mwi ni naranu wagipye no ume wo pana ni tirasu na
paru no nwo ni asaru kigisi no tumagwopwi ni ono ga atari wo pito ni siretutu
yo no tune ni kikeba kurusiki ywobukwodori kowe natukasiki toki ni pa narinu
wa ga yadwo ni makisi nadesikwo itu si ka mo pana ni sakinamu naswopetutu mimu
tubana nuku asadi ga para no tubosumire ima sakari nari wa ga kwopuraku pa
kokoroguki mono ni so arikyeru parukasumi tanabiku toki ni kwopwi no sigeki pa
midutorino kamo no pa no iro no paruyama no obotukanaku mo omopoyuru kamo

sentence.transcription: kamo no pa no iro no

block.header: yamwi naraba ube mo kimasazi ume no pana sakyeru tukuywo ni idemasazi to ya

tamatasuki kakenu toki naku iki no wo ni wa ga omopu kimi pa utusemi no yo no pito nareba opokimi no mikoto kasikwomi yupu sareba tadu ga tuma ywobu nanipagata mitunosaki ywori opobune ni makadi sizinuki siranami no takaki arumi wo simadutapi iwakareyukaba todomareru ware pa nusa piki ipapitutu kimi woba matamu paya kapyerimase
nami no upe yu miyuru kwosima no kumogakuri ana ikidukasi apiwakarenaba
tamakiparu inoti ni mukapi kwopwimu yu pa kimi ga mipune no kadikara ni moga
ko no pana no pitoyo no uti ni momokusa no koto so komoreru oporokani su na
ko no pana no pitoyo no uti pa momokusa no koto motikanete worayekyerazu ya
yadwo ni aru sakura no pana pa ima mo ka mo matukaze payami tuti ni tiru ramu
yononaka mo tune ni si araneba yadwo ni aru sakura no pana no tireru koro kamo
wake ga tame wa ga te mo sumani paru no nwo ni nukyeru tubana so myesite kwoyemase

sentence.transcription: wa ga te mo suma ni

block.header: piru pa saki yworu pa kwopwi nuru nebu no pana kimi nomwi mime ya wake sape ni miyo
wa ga kimi ni wake pa kwopu rasi tabaritaru tubana wo pamedo iya yase ni yasu
wagimokwo ga katami no nebu pa pana nomwi ni sakite kedasiku mwi ni narazi kamo
parukasumi tanabiku yama no pyenarereba imo ni apazute tukwi so penikyeru
pototogisu itaku na naki so na ga kowe wo satukwi no tama ni apenuku madeni
kamunabwi no ipase no mori no pototogisu kenasi no woka ni itu ka kinakamu
pototogisu nakaru kuni ni mo yukitesika so no naku kowe wo kikeba kurusi mo

sentence.transcription: na ka ru kuni ni mo

block.header: pototogisu kowe kiku wonwo no akikaze ni pagwi sakinure ya kowe no tomosiki
asipikino yamapototogisu na ga nakeba ipye n aru imo si tune ni omopoyu
mononopuno ipase no mori no pototogisu ima mo nakanu ka yama no tokage ni
kwopwisikyeba katami ni semu to wa ga yadwo ni uwesi pudinami ima sakinikyeri
pototogisu kinaki toyomosu unopana no tomo ni ya kosi to twopamasi monowo

sentence.transcription: tomo ni ya ko si to

block.header: tatibana no pana tiru satwo no pototogisu katakwopwi situtu naku pi si so opoki

sentence.transcription: naku pi si so opo ki

block.header: ima mo ka mo opokwinoyama ni pototogisu nakitoyomu ramu ware nakyeredo mo
nani si ka mo kokodaku kwopuru pototogisu naku kowe kikeba kwopwi koso masare
pitori wite monomopu yopi ni pototogisu ko yu nakiwataru kokoro si aru rasi
unopana mo imada sakaneba pototogisu sapo no yamapye ni kinaki toyomosu
wa ga yadwo no panatatibana no itu si ka mo tama ni nuku beku so no mwi narinamu

sentence.transcription: so no mwi nari na mu

block.header: komori nomwi woreba ibusemi nagusamu to idetati kikeba kinaku pigurasi
wa ga yadwo ni tukwi ositereri pototogisu kokoroaraba koyopi kinaki toyomose
wa ga yadwo no panatatibana ni pototogisu ima koso nakame tomo ni apyeru toki

sentence.transcription: tomo ni ap ye ru toki

block.header: mwinapito no matisi unopana tirinu tomo naku pototogisu ware wasureme ya
wa ga sekwo ga yadwo no tatibana pana wo yomi naku pototogisu mi ni so wa ga kosi

sentence.transcription: mi ni so wa ga ko si

block.header: pototogisu itaku na naki so pitori wite i no nerayenu ni kikeba kurusi mo
natu makete sakitaru panezu pisakatano ame utipuraba uturopinamu ka
wa ga yadwo no panatatibana wo pototogisu kinakazu tuti ni tirasitemu to ka
pototogisu omopazu ariki konokure no kaku naru madeni nani ka kinakanu
iduku ni pa naki mo sinikyemu pototogisu wagipye no satwo ni kyepu nomwi so naku

sentence.transcription: naki mo si ni kye mu

block.header: wa ga yadwo no panatatibana pa tirisugwite tama ni nuku beku mwi ni narinikyeri
pototogisu matedo kinakazu ayamyegusa tama ni nuku pi wo imada topomi ka
unopana no sugwiba wosimi ka pototogisu amama mo okazu ko yu nakiwataru
kimi ga ipye no panatatibana pa narinikyeri pana naru toki ni apamasi monowo
wa ga yadwo no panatatibana wo pototogisu kinaki toyomete moto ni tirasitu
natuyama no konure no sige ni pototogisu nakitoyomu naru kowe no parukesa
asipiki no konoma tatikuku pototogisu kaku kikisomete noti kwopwimu kamo
wa ga yadwo no nadesikwo no pana sakari nari taworite pitome misemu kwo moga mo
tukupane ni wa ga yukyeriseba pototogisu yamabikwo toyome nakamasi ya sore

sentence.transcription: wa ga yuk ye ri seba

block.header: itwoma nami kozarisi kimi ni pototogisu ware kaku kwopu to yukite tugekoso
koto sigemi kimi pa kimasazu pototogisu nare dani kinakye asatwo pirakamu
natu no nwo no sigemi ni sakyeru pimyeyuri no sirayenu kwopwi pa kurusiki mono so
pototogisu naku wo no upe no unopana no uki koto are ya kimi ga kimasanu
satukwi no panatatibana wo kimi ga tame tama ni turanuku tiramaku wosimi
wagimokwo ga ipye no kakitu no sayuribana yuri to ipyeru pa ina to ipu ni nimu

sentence.transcription: ina to ipu ni ni mu

block.header: itwoma nami satukwi wo surani wagimokwo ga panatatibana wo mizu ka sugusamu
pototogisu nakisi sunapati kimi ga ipye ni yukye to opisi pa itarikyemu kamo
purusatwo no narasi no woka no pototogisu koto tugeyarisi ikani tugeki ya

ikato ikato aru wa ga yadwo ni momoye sasi opuru tatibana tama ni nuku satukwi wo tikami ayenu gani pana sakinikyeri asa ni ke ni ide miru gotoni iki no wo ni wa ga omopu imo ni maswokagami kiywoki tukuywo ni tada pitome misuru madeni pa tirikosu na yume to ipitutu kokodaku mo wa ga moru monowo uretaki ya sikopototogisu akatoki no uraganasiki ni opedo opedo napo si kinakite itadurani tuti ni tiraseba subye wo nami yodite taworitu mimase wagimokwo
moti kutati kiywoki tukuywo ni wagimokwo ni misemu to omopisi yadwo no tatibana
imo ga mite noti mo nakanamu pototogisu panatatibana wo tuti ni tirasitu
nadesikwo pa sakite tirinu to pito pa ipedo wa ga simesi nwo no pana ni arame ya mo

sentence.transcription: wa ga sime si nwo no
pana ni ara me ya mo

block.header: yupu sareba woguranoyama ni naku sika pa koyopi pa nakazu inenikye rasi mo

sentence.transcription: i ne ni kye rasi mo

block.header: tate mo naku nuki mo sadamezu wotomyera ga oreru momiti ni simo na puri sone
kyesa no asake karigane kikitu kasugayama momitinikye rasi wa ga kokoro itasi
akipagwi pa saku beku aru rasi wa ga yadwo no asadi ga pana no tiriyuku mireba
koto sigeki satwo ni sumazupa kyesa nakisi kari ni tagupite yukamasi monowo
koto sigeki kuni ni arazupa kyesa nakisi kari ni tagupite yukamasi monowo
akiyama ni momitu konopa no uturinaba sarani ya aki wo mimaku pori semu
umasake miwa no papuri no yama terasu aki no momiti no tiramaku wosi mo
ama no gapa apimukitatite wa ga kwopwisi kimi kimasu nari pimo tokimakena
ama no gapa kapa ni mukapite wa ga kwopwisi kimi kimasu nari pimo tokimakena
pisakatano ama no kapase ni pune ukete koyopi ka kimi ga wagari kimasamu

pikwoposi pa tanabata tu mye to ametuti no wakaresi toki yu inausiro kapa ni mukitati omopu swora yasukyenaku ni nageku swora yasukyenaku ni awonami ni nozomi pa tayenu sirakumo ni namita pa tukwinu kaku nomwi ya ikiduki woramu kaku nomwi ya kwopwitutu aramu saninuri no wobune moga mo tamamaki no makai moga mo asanagi ni ikakiwatari yupusipo ni ikogiwatari pisakatano ama no kapara ni amatobuya pire katasiki matamade no tamade sasikape amata ywo mo netesi kamo aki ni arazu tomo

pikwoposi pa tanabata tu mye to ametuti no wakaresi toki yu inausiro kapa ni mukitati omopu swora yasukyenaku ni nageku swora yasukyenaku ni awonami ni nozomi pa tayenu sirakumo ni namita pa tukwinu kaku nomwi ya ikiduki woramu kaku nomwi ya kwopwitutu aramu saninuri no wobune moga mo tamamaki no wosawo moga mo asanagi ni ikakiwatari yupupe ni mo ikogiwatari pisakatano ama no kapara ni amatobuya pire katasiki matamade no tamade sasikape amata ywo mo imo sanetesika aki matazu tomo
kazekumo pa putatu no kwisi ni kaywopedomo wa ga topoduma no koto so kaywopanu
kazekumo pa putatu no kwisi ni kaywopedomo wa ga pasiduma no koto so kaywopanu
tabute ni mo nagekwositu beki ama no gapa pyedatereba ka mo amata subye naki
akikaze no pukinisi pi ywori itu si ka to wa ga matikwopwisi kimi so kimaseru

sentence.transcription: kimi so ki mas e ru

block.header: ama no gapa itwo kapanami pa tatanedomo samorapigatasi tikaki ko no se wo

sentence.transcription: tika ki ko no se wo

block.header: swode puraba mi mo kapasitu beku tikakyedomo wataru subye nasi aki ni si araneba

sentence.transcription: mi mo kapasi tu be ku

block.header: tamakagiru ponokani miyete wakarenaba motona ya kwopwimu apu toki made pa
pikwoposi si tumamukapebune kogidu rasi ama no kapara ni kwiri no tateru pa
kasumi tatu ama no kapara ni kimi matu to ikaywopu potwo ni mo no suswo nurenu
ama no gapa ukitu no namioto sawaku nari wa ga matu kimi si punade su rasi mo
wominapyesi akipagwi maziru asikwi no nwo kyepu wo pazimete yoroduyo ni mimu
tamakusige asikwi no kapa wo kyepu mite pa yoroduyo madeni wasurayeme ya mo
kusamakura tabi yuku pito mo yukipureba nipopinu beku mo sakyeru pagwi kamo
ikagwoyama nwopye ni sakitaru pagwi mireba kimi ga ipye n aru wobana si omopoyu
wominapyesi akipagwi worere tamapokono mitiyukitutwo to kopamu kwo ga tame
wa ga sekwo wo itu so ima ka to matu nabeni omoya pa miyemu aki no kaze puku
yopi ni apite asita omo nami nabarinwo no pagwi pa tiriniki momiti paya tugye
aki no nwo ni sakitaru pana wo oyobi wori kakikazwopureba nanakusa no pana
pagwi no pana wobana kuzupana nadesikwo no pana wominapyesi mata pudibakama asagapo no pana
aki no ta no poda wo karigane kurakyeku ni ywo no podoro ni mo nakiwataru kamo

sentence.transcription: po da wo kari ga ne

block.header: kyesa no asake karigane samuku kikisi nape nwopye no asadi so irodukinikyeru

sentence.transcription: nwo pye no asa di so

block.header: wa ga woka ni sawosika kinaku patupagwi no pana tumadopi ni kinaku sawosika
wa ga woka no akipagwi no pana kaze wo itami tiru beku narinu mimu pito moga mo
aki no tuyu pa utusi ni arikyeri midutorino awoba no yama no iroduku mireba
pikwoposi no omopimasu ramu kokoro ywori miru ware kurusi ywo no pukeyukeba
tanabata no swode tugu yopi no akatoki pa kapase no tadu pa nakazu tomo yosi
imogari to wa ga yuku miti no kapa ni areba tukume musubu to ywo so kutatikyeru
sawosika no pagwi ni nukiokyeru tuyu no siratama apusawani tare no pito ka mo te ni makamu t ipu

sentence.transcription: te ni maka mu t ipu

block.header: saku pana mo wosoro pa itopasi okute naru nagaki kokoro ni napo sikazukyeri
imetatete tomi no wokapye no nadesikwo no pana pusa tawori ware pa yukinamu narapito no tame
akipagwi no tirinomagapi ni ywobitatete naku naru sika no kowe no parukesa
toki matite pureru sigure no ame yaminu akemu asita ka yama no momitamu
yupudukuywo kokoro mo sinwoni siratuyu no oku ko no nipa ni koporogi naku mo
sigure no ame manaku si pureba mikasayama konure amaneku irodukinikyeri
opokimino mikasanoyama no momitiba pa kyepu no sigure ni tiri ka sugwinamu
aki tatite ikuka mo araneba ko no nenuru asake no kaze pa tamoto samusi mo
akita karu karipo mo imada kopotaneba karigane samusi simo mo okinu gani
asukagapa yukimwiru woka no akipagwi pa kyepu puru ame ni tiri ka sugwinamu
uduranaku purinisi satwo no akipagwi wo omopu pitodwoti apimituru kamo
akipagwi pa sakarisuguru wo itadurani kazasi ni sasazu kapyerinamu to ya
imogamewo misome no saki no akipagwi pa ko no tukwigoro pa tirikosu na yume
yonabari no wikapi no yama ni pusu sika no tuma ywobu kowe wo kiku ga tomosisa
tare kikitu ko yu nakiwataru karigane no tuma ywobu kowe no tomosiku mo aru ka
kikitu ya to imo ga twopaseru karigane pa makoto mo topoku kumogakuru nari
akidukeba wobana ga upe ni oku tuyu no kenu beku mo a pa omopoyuru kamo

sentence.transcription: ke nu be ku mo a pa

block.header: wa ga yadwo no pitomurapagwi wo omopu kwo ni misezu potopoto tirasituru kamo
pisakatano amama mo okazu kumogakuri naki so yuku naru wasada karigane
kumogakuri naku naru kari no yukite wimu akita no potati sigeku si omopoyu
amagomori kokoro ibusemi ide mireba kasuganoyama pa irodukinikyeri
ame parete kiywoku teritaru ko no tukuywo mata saranisite kumo na tanabiki
koko nisite kasuga ya iduku ama sapari idete yukaneba kwopwitutu so woru
kasuganwo ni sigure puru miyu asu ywori pa momiti kazasamu takamatwonoyama
wa ga yadwo no wobana ga upe no siratuyu wo ketazute tama ni nuku mono ni moga
aki no ame ni nuretutu woreba iyasikyedo wagimo ga yadwo si omopoyuru kamo
kumo no upe ni naku naru kari no topokyedomo kimi ni apamu to tamotoporikitu
kumo no upe ni nakituru kari no samuki nabe pagwi no sitaba pa momitinuru kamo
ko no woka ni wosika pumiokosi ukanerapi kamokamo suraku kimi yuweni koso
aki no nwo no wobana ga ure wo osinabete kosiku mo siruku apyeru kimi kamo
kyesa nakite yukisi karigane samumi ka mo ko no nwo no asadi irodukinikyeru

sentence.transcription: ko no nwo no asa di

block.header: asatwo akete monomopu toki ni siratuyu no okyeru akipagwi miyetutu motona
sawosika no kitatinaku nwo no akipagwi pa tuyusimo opite tirinisi monowo
taworazute tirinaba wosi to wa ga omopisi aki no momiti wo kazasituru kamo
medurasiki pito ni misemu to momitiba wo tawori so wa ga kosi ame no puraku ni

sentence.transcription: ta wori so wa ga ko si

block.header: momitiba wo tirasu sigure ni nurete kite kimi ga momiti wo kazasituru kamo
medurasi to wa ga omopu kimi pa akiyama no patumomitiba ni nite koso arikyere
narayama no mine no momitiba toreba tiru sigure no ame si manaku puru rasi
momitiba wo tiramaku wosimi taworikite koyopi kazasitu nani ka omopamu
asipikino yama no momitiba koyopi mo ka ukabiyuku ramu yamagapa no se ni
narayama wo nipopasu momiti taworikite koyopi kazasitu tiraba tiru tomo
tuyusimo ni apyeru momiti wo taworikite imo pa kazasitu noti pa tiru tomo
kamunadukwi sigure ni apyeru momitiba no pukaba tirinamu kaze no manima ni
momitiba no sugwimaku wosimi omopu dwoti aswobu koyopi pa akezu mo aranu ka

sentence.transcription: ake zu mo ara nu ka

block.header: sika to aranu iposiro wo da wo karimidari tabuse ni woreba miyakwo si omopoyu

sentence.transcription: i po siro wo da wo

block.header: komorikuno patusenoyama pa irodukinu sigure no ame pa purinikye rasi mo
sigure no ame manaku na puri so kurenawi ni nipopyeru yama no tiramaku wosi mo

sentence.transcription: ma na ku na puri so

block.header: akipagwi no yeda mo towowoni oku tuyu no kenaba kenu tomo iro ni ideme ya mo

sentence.transcription: iro ni ide me ya mo

block.header: imo ga ipye no kadwota wo mimu to utiidekosi kokoro mo siruku teru tukuywo kamo

sentence.transcription: kadwo ta wo mi mu to

block.header: aki no nwo ni sakyeru akipagwi akikaze ni nabikyeru upe ni aki no tuyu okyeri
sawosika no asa tatu nwopye no akipagwi ni tama to miru made okyeru siratuyu
sawosika no munawake ni ka mo akipagwi no tirisugwinikyeru sakari ka mo inuru
tumagwopwi ni ka naku yamapye no akipagwi pa tuyusimo samumi sakarisugwiyuku
medurasiki kimi ga ipye n aru panasusuki po ni iduru aki no suguraku wosi mo
yamabikwo no apitoyomu made tumagwopwi ni ka naku yamapye ni pitori nomwi site
ko no koro no asake ni kikeba asipikwino yama ywobitoyome sawosika naku mo
aki sareba kasuganoyama no momiti miru naranomiyakwo no aruraku wosi mo
takamatwo no nwopye no akipagwi ko no koro no akatokituyu ni sakinikyemu kamo
kimi matu to wa ga kwopwi woreba wa ga yadwo no sudare ugwokasi aki no kaze puku
kaze wo dani kwopuru pa tomosi kaze wo dani komu to si mataba nani ka nagekamu
akipagwi no upe ni okitaru siratuyu no ke ka mo sinamasi kwopwitutu arazupa
uda no nwo no akipagwi sinwogi naku sika mo tuma ni kwopuraku ware ni pa masazi
takamatwo no aki no nwo no upe no nadesikwo no pana urawakami pito no kazasisi nadesikwo no pana

sentence.transcription: aki no nwo no upe no

block.header: asipikwino yamasita toyome naku sika no koto tomosi kamo wa ga kokorotuma
kamusabu to inabu ni pa arane akikusano musubisi pimo wo toku pa kanasi mo
aki no nwo wo asa yuku sika no atwo mo naku omopisi kimi ni apyeru koyopi ka
nagatukwi no so no patukari no tukapi ni mo omopu kokoro pa kikoyekonu kamo
oponoura no so no nagapama ni yosuru nami yutakeku kimi wo omopu ko no koro
asa gotoni wa ga miru yadwo no nadesikwo no pana ni mo kimi pa arikosenu kamo
akipagwi ni okitaru tuyu no kaze pukite oturu namita pa todomekanetu mo
tama ni nuki ketazu tabaramu akipagwi no urewawaraba ni okyeru siratuyu
tamapokono miti pa topokyedo pasikiyasi imo wo apimi ni idete so wa ga kosi

sentence.transcription: idete so wa ga ko si

block.header: aratamano tukwi tatu madeni kimasaneba ime ni si mitutu omopi so wa ga sesi

sentence.transcription: omopi so wa ga se si

block.header: wa ga yadwo no pagwipana sakyeri mi ni kimase ima putuka bakari araba tirinamu
wa ga yadwo no aki no pagwi saku yupukage ni ima mo mitesika imo ga sugata wo
wa ga yadwo ni momitu kapyerute miru gotoni imo wo kaketutu kwopwinu pi pa nasi

sentence.transcription: kwopwi nu pi pa na si

block.header: wa ga makyeru wasada no potati tukuritaru kadura so mitutu sinwopase wa ga se
wagimokwo ga nari to tukureru aki no ta no wasapo no kadura miredo akanu kamo
akikaze no samuki ko no koro sita ni kimu imo ga katami to katu mo sinwopamu
wa ga yadwo no tokiziki pudi no medurasiku ima mo mitesika imo ga wemapi wo
wa ga yadwo no pagwi no sitaba pa akikaze mo imada pukaneba kaku so momiteru

nemokoroni mono wo omopeba ipamu subye semu subye mo nasi imo to ware te tadusaparite asita ni pa nipa ni idetati yupupye ni pa toko utiparapi sirwotapeno swode sasikapete sanesi ywo ya tune ni arikyeru asipikwino yamadori kosoba wo mukapi ni tumadopi su to ipe utusemi no pito naru ware ya nani su to ka pitopi pitoywo mo sakariwite nagekikwopu ramu koko omopeba mune koso itaki soko yuweni kokoro nagu ya to takamatwonoyama ni mo nwo ni mo utiyukite aswobiarukedo pana nomwi nipopite areba miru gotoni masite omopoyu ikanisite wasuremu mono so kwopwi to ipu mono wo

sentence.transcription: se mu subye mo na si
yama ni mo nwo ni mo

block.header: takamatwo no nwopye no kapobana omokage ni miyetutu imo pa wasurekanetu mo
ima tukuru kuninomiyakwo ni aki no ywo no nagaki ni pitori nuru ga kurusisa
asipikwino yamapye ni worite akikaze no pinikyeni pukeba imo wo si so omopu
te mo sumani uwesi pagwi ni ya kapyerite pa miredomo akazu kokorotukusamu
koromode ni misibu tuku made uwesi ta wo pikita wa ga pape mamoreru kurusi
sapogapa no midu wo sekiagete uwesi ta wo karu wasaipi pa pitori naru besi
opokutino makamwinopara ni puru yuki pa itaku na puri so ipye mo aranaku ni

sentence.transcription: ipye mo ara na ku ni

block.header: padasusuki wobana sakapuki kurwokwi moti tukureru ipye pa yoroduyo madeni
awoniyosi naranoyama n aru kurwokwi moti tukureru ipye pa masedo akanu kamo
awayuki no podoropodoroni purisikeba naranomiyakwo si omopoyuru kamo
wa ga woka ni sakari ni sakyeru ume no pana nokoreru yuki wo magapeturu kamo
awayuki ni purayete sakyeru ume no pana kimigari yaraba yosopetemu kamo
tanagwirapi yuki mo puranu ka ume no pana sakanu ga siro ni sopete dani mimu
amagwirasi yuki mo puranu ka itisirwoku ko no itusiba ni puramaku wo mimu
pikiyodite woraba tiru bemi ume no pana swode ni kwokiretu simaba simu tomo

sentence.transcription: swode ni kwok i re tu

block.header: wa ga yadwo no puyukwi no upe ni puru yuki wo ume no pana ka to utimituru kamo
nubatamano koyopi no yuki ni iza nurena akemu asita ni kenaba wosikyemu
ume no pana yeda ni ka tiru to miru madeni kaze ni midarete yuki so purikuru
sipasu ni pa awayuki puru to sirane ka mo ume no pana saku pupumyerazusite
kyepu purisi yuki ni kipopite wa ga yadwo no puyukwi no ume pa pana sakinikyeri
ike no pye no matu no uraba ni puru yuki pa ipopye purisikye asu sape mo mimu
awayuki no ko no koro tugite kaku puraba ume no patupana tiri ka sugwinamu
ume no pana wori mo worazu mo mituredomo koyopi no pana ni napo sikazukyeri
ima no goto kokoro wo tune ni omopyeraba madu saku pana no tuti ni otime ya mo

sentence.transcription: tuti ni oti me ya mo

block.header: matukage no asadi no upe no sirayuki wo ketazute okamu kotoba ka mo naki

sentence.transcription: koto ba ka mo na ki

block.header: takayama no suga no pa sinwogi puru yuki no kenu to ipu beku mo kwopwi no sigekyeku

sentence.transcription: ke nu to ipu be ku mo

block.header: sakaduki ni ume no pana ukabe omopu dwoti nomite no noti pa tirinu tomo yosi
tukasa ni mo yurusitamapyeri koyopi nomwi nomamu sake kamo tirikosu na yume
wa ga sekwo to putari mimaseba ikubaku ka ko no puru yuki no uresikaramasi
makwi no upe ni puriokyeru yuki no sikusiku mo omopoyuru kamo saywo twopye wa ga se

sentence.transcription: sa ywo twopye wa ga se

block.header: ume no pana tirasu arasi no oto nomwi ni kikisi wagimo wo miraku si yosi mo

sentence.transcription: mi raku si yo si mo

block.header: pisakatano tukuywo wo kiywomi ume no pana kokoro pirakete wa ga omopyeru kimi
awayuki no kenu beki monowo ima madeni nagarapenuru pa imo ni apamu to so

sentence.transcription: ke nu be ki mono wo
imo ni apa mu to so

block.header: awayuki no nipa ni purisiki samuki ywo wo tamakura makazu pitori ka mo nemu

sentence.transcription: pito ri ka mo ne mu
